layout.name: chase
layout.title: Chase Player
layout.tooltip: When checked, the Height Gain setting is ignored and the Blooper chases players in both directions.

layout.name: heightGain
layout.title: Height Gain
layout.tooltip: Per movement cycle, how many pixels does the blooper rise? Negative values indicate a drop.

layout.name: riseDuration
layout.title: Rise Duration
layout.tooltip: The number of frames a blooper rises in a movement cycle.
